description: Per-class evidence profile for discrepancy_class 'multi_source' — two sources disagree about what happened (e.g. SAP says 100, PLC-counter says 110, BDE scrap says 10). Raised by the discrepancy-engine reconcile path (HTTP /api/reconcile quantity balance) and by the it-evaluator cross-source bridge. Emitted with kgNodeLabel MultiSourceDiscrepancy (services/discrepancy-engine/src/snapshot.ts classDiscrepancyLabel:105-106). The source_a/value_a/source_b/value_b/delta evidence block matches the engine projection (services/discrepancy-engine/src/types.ts:242-246), which snapshot.ts copies verbatim onto the node. Inherits the full lifecycle from Discrepancy.
